---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new metric, visualization, or export format
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature.

**Why is this useful?**
What problem does it solve or what decision does it help you make?

**Proposed solution (optional)**
If you have an idea of how it could work — formula, API, example output.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workaround you're currently using.
